dashboardMetadata.name: Infra Overview - {{ambiente}}
dashboardMetadata.description: Overview de hosts e infraestructura. Placeholders a reemplazar antes de importar: ${TU_MZ_ID}, ${TU_HOST_GROUP_ID}, {{ambiente}}.

tiles.name: CPU saturada por host
tiles.query: timeseries avg_cpu = avg(dt.host.cpu.usage), by: { dt.entity.host }, filter: { managementZones contains "${TU_MZ_ID}" } | sort avg_cpu desc | limit 25

tiles.name: Hosts del grupo {{ambiente}}
tiles.query: fetch dt.entity.host | filter in(belongs_to[dt.entity.host_group], "${TU_HOST_GROUP_ID}") | fields entity.name, dt.entity.host
